AdditionalAttributes.description:
SUSTAGEN Ready to Drink is a low GI, high protein, nutrient packed way to start your day or great as a mid-afternoon snack to support an active lifestyle.

SUSTAGEN Ready to Drink is a low GI, high protein, nutrient packed way to start your day or great as a mid-afternoon snack to support an active lifestyle.

Packed with 12.5 grams of protein in every serve plus 16 key vitamins and minerals, SUSTAGEN Ready to Drink is a great way to boost your health and being low GI, it gives you sustained energy to support an active lifestyle.

SUSTAGEN Ready to Drink comes in three great flavours:
- Dutch Chocolate flavour
- Vanilla flavour
- Strawberry flavour

*GI = 43 (Dutch Chocolate flavour)
*GI = 47 (Vanilla flavour)
*GI = 43 (Strawberry flavour)

SUSTAGEN Ready to Drink is a Formulated Supplementary Foods which can be of assistance where dietary intakes of nutrients and energy may not be adequate. Consume as part of a varied and balanced diet and healthy lifestyle.

Protein - Supports muscle health

Vitamins - Packed with 16 key Vitamins

Low GI - Sustained energy to support an active lifestyle

Mutti has been processing tomatoes with passion for over 100 years. Zafarelli Fusilli No. 17 is a spiral-shaped pasta that captures sauce in every groove and cooks in 9 minutes.

Since 1985, Zafarelli has been crafting Italian-style pasta from 100% durum wheat semolina to bring the taste of Italy to Australian households.

Zafarelli Fusilli No. 17 is a spiral-shaped pasta that cooks in 9 minutes. Its twisted grooves effortlessly capture sauces, vegetables, and cheese, making it ideal for pasta salads, bakes, or hearty tomato-based dishes.

Fusilli’s fun shape makes it popular with kids and adults alike, and it’s perfect for adding texture and flair to everyday meals. Zafarelli brings out the true Italian in everyone.

AdditionalAttributes.description:
The great taste of the famous Lotus Biscoff biscuits in an jar.

To turn our biscuits into this irresistibly smooth spread, we crush them finely after baking. That's how we keep all the goodness of Biscoff's unique flavour. To be savoured by everyone. Spread onto bread or toast, drizzled over pancakes or in your favourite homebaked delicious recipe. Nut Free, Vegan friendly with no artificial colours or flavours.

The story of Lotus Biscoff starts in 1932 in a local bakery in Lembeke, a Belgian town. A baker named Jan Boone Senior created a caramilised biscuit with nothing but natural ingredients, naming it Lotus, after the flower that symbolises purity.  Today, Lotus Bakeries is still family-owned and based in its hometown, where the ingredients are as pure, the taste as unique and the biscuits as crunchy as ever. Lotus Biscoff's popularity continues to grow around the world. Its secret? The distinctive caramelised taste appreciated by young and old. 

- Nut Free

- No Artificial Colours or Flavours

- Suitable for Vegans & Vegetarians

- Available in a smooth and crunchy variants

- 100% Natural

- Enjoy on a slice of bread or toast

- Made in Belgium

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Start your day the Aussie way with VEGEMITE! 
 
VEGEMITE is more than just a spread; it's a national icon that has been bringing smiles to Australian faces since 1923. Made from a unique blend of brewers' yeast extract and enriched with essential B vitamins, VEGEMITE is a powerhouse of nutrition and flavour. 
 
Taste the Tradition: VEGEMITE's rich, savoury taste is a beloved staple in Australian households. Its bold, umami flavour, with a hint of saltiness, is perfect for those who crave a distinctive and satisfying taste experience. Spread it thinly on buttered toast for a classic breakfast or add it to your favourite sandwich for an extra burst of flavour. 
 
Versatility at Its Best: VEGEMITE isn't just for toast. Its versatility makes it a secret ingredient in many recipes. Use it to enhance the flavour of soups, stews, and marinades, or pair it with cheese and avocado for a delicious twist. The possibilities are endless! 
 
Health Benefits: Packed with B vitamins, VEGEMITE supports your overall well-being. Thiamin (B1) is essential for brain function, riboflavin (B2) supports your nervous system, niacin (B3) aids in energy release, and folate helps fight fatigue. Enjoy VEGEMITE as part of a balanced, varied diet and active lifestyle. 
 
A True Aussie Icon: Proudly owned and made in Australia, VEGEMITE embodies the spirit of the nation. Its rich history and unique taste make it a symbol of Australian culture and heritage. Whether you're a lifelong fan or trying it for the first time, VEGEMITE is sure to bring a touch of Aussie pride to your table. 
 
Discover the delicious and nutritious world of VEGEMITE today. 



B1 essential for brain function.

B2 supports your nervous system.

B3 essential for energy release.

Folate helps fight fatigue.

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Turn every Tuesday into Taco Tuesday with the help of Old El Paso™ Mild Taco Sauce. Made with paprika, cayenne pepper, and jalapeno peppers, Old El Paso™ mild taco topping sauce adds a hint of spice and vibrant Mexican flavour to your favourite homemade tacos. Whether you prefer soft tortillas or crunchy taco shells, stuff with your favourite meat filling (or vegetarian alternative), add your favourite toppings like cheese and guacamole, then finish this with flavoursome taco sauce. Not sure the ‘mild’ heat level is for you? Opt for Old El Paso™ medium or hot alternatives. Better yet, try them all to see what heat level you can handle. Perfect for a midweek Mexican feast or weekend get-togethers, make tacos a regular on your weekly shopping list. Old El Paso™ Mild Taco Sauce works as a topping on 10 tacos.

Tip: Make it meat free and swap out the meat for veggies to make it vegan.
